gym.notes: The routine holds. This is the thing that held during AEI, during the transition, during the uncomfortable winter. I am grateful for it in a way I wasn't when I started it.

atlantic_column.status: Week 11 draft complete — on the four macronutrients of happiness
atlantic_column.notes: This is the column that synthesizes the whole framework. Faith, family, friendship, work — in that order. The ordering will bother people. It bothers me slightly and I wrote it. The data supports it. I am going to publish it as written.

book.notes: Sent the proposal draft to the agent. 28 pages plus sample chapter. The title is still wrong — everything I try is either too academic or too self-help. The book is neither. Waiting to hear.
book.anxiety: Low. The proposal is honest. Whatever happens to it is separate from whether the work is right.

harvard.notes: Lunch with three Kennedy School colleagues today. I am still finding my footing here. AEI had a culture I understood completely — I built part of it. Harvard has a culture I am still learning. I am sometimes the most conservative person in a room for the first time in ten years. I notice this without knowing yet what to do with it.

friendship.notes: Dinner with Paul and Maria was good. Talked for four hours about nothing professional. I had forgotten that this was possible. I have scheduled it for next month already.
friendship.observation: I treated friendship as currency for a decade. Now I am trying to treat it as an end. The muscle is atrophied. It is coming back.

ester.notes: She is reading the sample chapter. She said it was the most honest thing I have written. She said it quietly, which was more meaningful than if she had said it with enthusiasm.
ester.rosary: Every night. This is the anchor.

wins: Second dinner with Paul and Maria on the calendar
at_risk: Harvard belonging — not a crisis, a process; will take time
note: The loneliness is real and mild. AEI was a community; Harvard is a collection of very good individuals. I am building something here but it is slower than the last time. The last time I had institutional momentum doing most of the work.
